commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR makes `closeRuntimeAfterCommand()` wait for an empty stdout write with a 2s fallback before forced exit and adds POSIX integration coverage for delayed-pipe output and stalled readers.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main writes large JSON through stdout and then schedules a hard exit after 50ms without drain handling. The PR body also supplies before/after byte counts for a >64KB delayed pipe; I did not run the live shell repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can add error-tolerant stdout flush handling and an EPIPE regression while preserving the contributor's proof and tests.

target.title: fix: flush stdout before forced exit to avoid 64KB pipe truncation
target.author: badmoo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
